description_long: This is a modern pair of rectangular eyeglasses with a full-rim frame that features clean, straight lines and a slightly angular silhouette. The frame appears to be made of a lightweight, durable material, likely plastic or acetate, with a matte finish that gives it a contemporary look. The temples are straight and slender, curving gently at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The lenses are clear and untinted, providing full visibility through both sides. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, with no visible nose pads or additional support structures. There are no visible embellishments, engravings, or brand logos on the frame, giving it a minimalist and understated appearance.
description: A sleek, rectangular pair of eyeglasses with a matte full-rim frame and clear lenses, featuring straight, minimalist temples and a solid bridge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular full-rim frame, clear lenses, and solid bridge with no visible nose pads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight, slender temple and the gentle curve at the end for ear support.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the frame and temples, emphasizing the uniform thickness and clean lines.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the straight temple and its subtle curvature at the tip.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular full-rim frame with straight, uniform thickness and clean, angular lines; minimalist and modern with no decorative features.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses are completely clear and transparent with no visible tint, coloration, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, integrated bridge with a straight, flat design and no visible nose pads or additional support.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, slender, and unadorned, with a gentle curve at the ends; no visible patterns, engravings, or embellishments.
